_desc_project: 專案名稱，會影響輸出資料夾的命名
_desc_models: 指定各階段使用的模型檔名 (需包含 .safetensors)
_desc_refine: controlnet_txt2img 只將草稿當姿勢來源；img2img 則會繼承草稿像素。正式輸出預設使用前者。
_desc_remix: Remix 模式設定。conflict_keywords 可手動指定要刪除的 Tag (如 ['hair'] )，若留空則只降低權重
_desc_gen: 若想覆蓋 settings.py 的預設長寬，可在這裡指定
_desc_seed: base_seed 設為 -1 代表全隨機，否則會固定種子以利重現
draft_prefix: masterpiece, high score, great score, absurdres, safe, anime style, detailed background,
draft_negative: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing finger, extra digits, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, low score, bad score, average score, signature, watermark, username, blurry,
final_prefix: masterpiece, high score, great score, absurdres, safe, anime style, detailed background,
final_negative: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing finger, extra digits, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, low score, bad score, average score, signature, watermark, username, blurry,
_desc_header: 人物特徵的基本 Prompt，會自動加到所有場景前
character_header: 1girl, solo, adult woman, (shrine maiden outfit, miko, white kosode, red hakama:1.2), (black hair, ponytail:1.1), cute face, delicate expression, looking at viewer,

scenes.prompt: standing at shinto shrine office, nighttime, lantern light, holding shinto amulet, serene smile, gentle lighting, detailed background
